result.status_detail: character.ai re-check: SAME ISSUE AS #557 — Yandere Hacker chat opened (URL: character.ai/chat/bm7_jQ635qtz3Y8abBaVDNAHE2ACC3Rm1SYo5aZhPlY), prompt sent via Type+Enter, but page IMMEDIATELY reverted to character.ai homepage (chat session lost). User message + AI response never rendered. Confirms H2 WebSocket NEEDS_ALTERNATIVE classification — APF interaction with character.ai's 13 active WS connections causes chat thread to be lost on send.
result.render_path: session_aborted (chat URL → homepage redirect on prompt send)
result.test_progression: page_load=OK, login=OK, character_select=OK, chat_open=OK, prompt_send=OK, render=FAIL (session lost)
result.verdict_diff_from_previous: IDENTICAL to #557 — H2 multi-WS connection pattern causes APF interaction to abort chat thread; user is silently bounced to homepage

notes: Batch F-13 character.ai. Reproducible same-as-557 failure: WS prompt-send causes chat session to be lost (homepage redirect). character.ai uses 13+ active WS connections per chat — APF response interception likely fails to multiplex correctly across all streams, causing client-side session abort. To fix: dedicated multi-WS handler OR pre-WS-handshake intercept point.
